::: lt-grid

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c1}
LT1
:::
::: lt-title
Calculate with Integers
:::
::: lt-desc
Add, subtract, multiply, and divide positive and negative numbers accurately.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Positive & negative]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Four operations]{.lt-skill .c1}
[Number line]{.lt-skill .c1}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c2}
LT2
:::
::: lt-title
Apply Order of Operations
:::
::: lt-desc
Evaluate numerical expressions using BODMAS, including brackets and exponents.
:::
::: lt-skills
[BODMAS]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Brackets]{.lt-skill .c2}
[Exponents]{.lt-skill .c2}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c3}
LT3
:::
::: lt-title
Operate with Fractions
:::
::: lt-desc
Add, subtract, multiply, and divide fractions and mixed numbers fluently.
:::
::: lt-skills
[LCD]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Mixed numbers]{.lt-skill .c3}
[Simplify]{.lt-skill .c3}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c4}
LT4
:::
::: lt-title
Work with Decimals
:::
::: lt-desc
Perform calculations with decimals and convert between fractions, decimals, and percentages.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Decimal operations]{.lt-skill .c4}
[FDP conversion]{.lt-skill .c4}
[Rounding]{.lt-skill .c4}
:::
:::

::: lt-card
::: {.lt-badge .c5}
LT5
:::
::: lt-title
Simplify Complex Calculations
:::
::: lt-desc
Combine integers, fractions, and decimals in multi-step numerical problems.
:::
::: lt-skills
[Multi-step]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Mixed types]{.lt-skill .c5}
[Problem solving]{.lt-skill .c5}
:::
:::

:::
